description: This file defines functions and types related to generating and replacing placeholder elements in HTML, including parsing HTML snippets, generating SVG or IMG placeholders, and handling placeholder options. It is part of a larger codebase involving HTML rendering and placeholder management.

methods.name: getPlaceholder
methods.description: Generates a placeholder object (SVG or IMG) based on user options, setting default values and constructing necessary attributes.

methods.name: replacePlaceholdersInHtml
methods.description: Replaces `<Placeholder />` components in HTML markup with generated placeholder HTML strings, parsing the input HTML and handling placeholder elements.

methods.name: renderPlaceholderToString
methods.description: Converts a placeholder object into its corresponding HTML string representation.

methods.name: getOptionsWithDefaults
methods.description: Merges user-provided options with default placeholder options.

methods.name: getPlaceholderSrc
methods.description: Creates a data URI for an SVG placeholder image, encoding the SVG with optional title and text.

methods.name: sanitizeHtmlAttributesFromMdx
methods.description: Sanitizes HTML attributes extracted from MDX, converting string booleans to actual booleans.
